---
title: "01_master_analysis"
output: html_notebook
---

## Prerequisites

This analysis notebook assumes that all data acquisition and processing scripts
in the `R/` directory have already been executed.

Specifically, the following scripts should be run **once, in order**, prior to
rendering this notebook:

1. `R/01_get_gbif_bats.R` — download raw GBIF bat occurrence data (2012–present)
2. `R/02_get_ca_counties.R` — acquire California county boundaries
3. `R/03_process_viirs_county_year.R` — summarize annual VIIRS nighttime lights to county × year
4. `R/04_clean_gbif_to_ca.R` — spatially filter GBIF occurrences to California
5. `R/05_aggregate_bats_county_year.R` — aggregate bat counts to county × year × species

These scripts write processed datasets to the `data/processed/` directory, which
are read by this notebook.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(here)

required_files <- c(
  "data/raw/gbif/bats_raw_2012plus.csv",
  "data/processed/boundaries/ca_counties.gpkg",
  "data/processed/viirs/viirs_county_year.csv",
  "data/processed/gbif/bats_county_year.csv"
)

missing <- required_files[!file.exists(here(required_files))]

if (length(missing) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Missing required data files:\n",
    paste(missing, collapse = "\n"),
    "\n\nPlease run the scripts in the R/ directory before rendering this notebook."
  )
}
```
